---
title: "<TOPIC CATEGORY> Training Recordings"
---

Missed the training? Don't worry! We record most of our trainings and you can watch them below.

## LESSON NAME

:::{.panel-tabset}
### 2025-26 Training Recordings

**Dec. 4^th^ 2025, INSTRUCTOR**

<iframe src="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1744ieGoL_GXMglC_zfLB_fbdryygA3o-/preview" width="640" height="480"></iframe>

<!---
To get the above video embedding code:
1. Click into the video file of image in the Google Drive
2. Click the "File" menu
3. Click "Get embed link"
4. Paste the newly-copied link into the relevant Quarto doc
--->

:::
